title: Sir T-Bag & DJ Mercy rock the bungy bridge
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Local DJs Tiaan...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Local DJs Tiaan Bezuidenhout (aka Sir T-Bag) and DJ Mercy of Vibe OF Vibe Entertainment brought the heat to new heights on Saturday 21 June at Bloukrans Bungy, the world’s highest bridge bungy.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Local DJs Tiaan Bezuidenhout (aka Sir T-Bag) and DJ Mercy of Vibe OF Vibe Entertainment brought the heat to new heights on Saturday 21 June at Bloukrans Bungy, the world’s highest bridge bungy."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"With fearless jumpers leaping into the gorge below, the duo lit up the iconic bridge with high-energy beats, turning the atmosphere into a pulsing open-air party."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Their dynamic set kept adrenaline levels soaring - not just for jumpers, but also for visitors soaking in the one-of-a-kind experience.","html":"Their dynamic set kept adrenaline levels soaring - not just for jumpers, but also for visitors soaking in the one-of-a-kind experience."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Blending extreme sport with vibrant local music, the event proved that Bloukrans isn’t just about the fall - it’s also about the vibe.","html":"Blending extreme sport with vibrant local music, the event proved that Bloukrans isn’t just about the fall - it’s also about the vibe."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Sir T-Bag & DJ Mercy rock the bungy bridge
